summary: Iteration 36 - Devis (Quote) Subscription System Testing. Backend: 15/18 tests passed (3 skipped access control tests). Frontend: Admin quotes page and Supplier dashboard with trial banner verified. Key features: 15-day free trial for fournisseurs, quote form submission, admin quote approval/rejection, account management (activate/suspend/delete).

minor.issue: Quotes with 'cancelled' status are returned but not documented - happens when associated account is deleted

ui_bugs.issue: getStatusBadge() doesn't handle 'cancelled' status - defaults to 'En attente' badge instead of showing 'Annule'

action_items: Add 'cancelled' status to getStatusBadge() in QuotesManagement.jsx to display 'Annule' badge
critical_code_review_comments: Backend subscription model correctly implements 15-day trial for fournisseur/acheteur/entreprise_rse user types
SubscriptionStatus enum properly includes PENDING_QUOTE and SUSPENDED states
Quote workflow: submit -> pending -> approved/rejected with proper subscription status updates
Admin account actions (activate/suspend/delete) work correctly with proper validation
Trial banner component (SubscriptionBanner.jsx) correctly shows trial days remaining
Quote form includes all required fields: company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, business_type, description
Access control via get_admin_user dependency properly restricts admin endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created new fournisseur account: test_supplier_3@test.com (+2250788888888) with active 15-day trial
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 tested the Devis subscription system. Backend APIs verified: GET /api/subscriptions/my-subscription (returns trial info), POST /api/subscriptions/quote/submit, GET /api/subscriptions/quote/my-quote, GET /api/admin/quotes (with stats), PUT /api/admin/quotes/{id} (approve/reject), GET /api/admin/devis-accounts, PUT /api/admin/accounts/{id}/action (activate/suspend/delete). Frontend verified: Admin /admin/quotes page with KPIs and account management, Supplier dashboard with trial banner. Test supplier account test_supplier_3@test.com is active with 14 days trial remaining. Original testfournisseur@test.com account was deleted during testing. Minor UI bug: cancelled quotes show 'En attente' badge instead of 'Annule'.
mocked_api_note: Orange Money, Orange SMS, USSD Gateway are MOCKED as per original requirements

Backend Subscription Endpoints.GET /api/subscriptions/my-subscription: PASS - Returns trial info with 15-day period
Backend Subscription Endpoints.POST /api/subscriptions/quote/submit: PASS - Supplier can submit quote form
Backend Subscription Endpoints.GET /api/subscriptions/quote/my-quote: PASS - User can check quote status

Backend Admin Endpoints.GET /api/admin/quotes: PASS - Lists quotes with pending/approved/rejected stats

Frontend Supplier Dashboard.Trial banner shows 15-day trial info: PASS - '14 jour(s) restant(s) sur vos 15 jours gratuits'
